name: Mondel Bread
recipeInstructions:
1 Cream the butter and add sugar gradually. Using an electric mixer at low speed, beat in the egg yolks, one at a time, until well blended. Add the vanilla and almond extracts.
2 Sift together the flour and baking powder. Gradually stir into the mixture alternately with beaten egg whites until just combined.
3 Fold in the orange peel (if using) and sliced almonds. Allow the dough to rest for 3-4 hours or overnight at room temperature.
4 Divide the dough into four equal parts. Roll each portion into a sausage shape, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter, and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5 Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes or until lightly golden around the edges. Remove from oven and let cool slightly on a rack.
6 While the loaves are still hot, slice each diagonally. Place the slices cut side down on the baking sheets and return to oven briefly until golden brown (about 5-7 minutes).
7 Let cool completely on racks before slicing or serving.
